arts.ttl: Exclusive: Wolves pushing to sign 26-cap defender who's a 'natural leader' with five other PL clubs also keen
arts.sum: TBR Football can reveal that Sunderland are facing a battle to hang on to Daniel Ballard in January. A host of Premier League clubs are...

arts.ttl: Wolves player tells Vítor Pereira areas to improve to help PL side get out of relegation zone
arts.sum: On Thursday, Wolverhampton Wanderers appointed Vítor Pereira as their new manager, just days after parting ways with Gary O’Neil. The Premier League side have just two league wins this season and this has seen them languish in 19th spot, five points behind 17th placed Leicester City. Wolves’ André has given an interview to ESPN in The post Wolves player tells Vítor Pereira areas to improve to help PL side get out of relegation zone appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Wolves preview: Cunha expected to be available
arts.sum: Wolves' new boss Vitor Pereira said the Premier League had been his target "for a long time" and he did not think twice after being offered the job. When asked about the importance of Sunday's match at Leicester, Pereira said: "I think every game in the Premier League is very important.

arts.ttl: Pereira fulfils Premier League dream at Wolves
arts.sum: New Wolves boss Vitor Pereira admits he has been chasing his Premier League dream for 14 years.

arts.ttl: “I couldn’t believe it” – Player still surprised Wolves signed him, thought it was a joke at first
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers defender Hugo Bueno has admitted he couldn’t believe when the club signed him as a youngster, believing their initial interest was a joke. 1908.nl cover comments from the 22-year-old today as he continues to impress on loan at Feyenoord from Wolves this season. He joined the Dutch side in search of regular football The post “I couldn’t believe it” – Player still surprised Wolves signed him, thought it was a joke at first appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Vitor Pereira says managing in Premier League is what attracted him to Wolves
arts.sum: Wolves sacked Gary O’Neil after Saturday’s 2-1 home defeat to Ipswich left them second bottom in the table.

arts.ttl: Vitor Pereira: Accepting Wolves job was an easy decision
arts.sum: Vitor Pereira says that 'he did not think twice' about accepting an offer to leave Al Shabab to become the new head coach of Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Hermansen, Stolarczyk, Winks, Ndidi - Leicester injury update ahead of Wolves
arts.sum: While Stolarczyk has not been definitively declared fit for a return to senior action, van Nistelrooy did say he would have a decision to make over the Pole. Mads Hermansen is fighting to be fit to face Wolves this weekend with the Leicester City goalkeeper’s groin problem only minor.
